store_header.notes: n=37. Mixed bucket: slogan/header text measures large (cap_rel med 1.171), but the Home Depot logo+slogan is rendered from the logo asset rather than scaled body text.

address.notes: n=148. Address/store lines are body-sized and normal weight (cap_rel med 1.012, stroke_rel med 0.985).

transaction.notes: n=14. SALE/CASHIER and register lines are body-sized and slightly light (cap_rel med 1.0, stroke_rel med 0.963).

item.notes: n=71. Body baseline (cap_rel med 1.0, stroke_rel med 1.024).

discount.notes: n=133. Pro Xtra / MAX REFUND lines are body-sized and normal weight (cap_rel med 1.0, stroke_rel med 0.974).

summary.notes: n=22. SUBTOTAL and SALES TAX lines print slightly smaller (cap_rel med 0.925) with normal stroke.

total_line.notes: n=21. TOTAL / USD amount block prints slightly smaller than body (cap_rel med 0.925) and normal weight.

payment.notes: n=49. Card/auth block is close to body size, a touch smaller/lighter (cap_rel med 0.975, stroke_rel med 0.976).

footer.notes: n=23. Pro Xtra footer and credit copy are body-sized and normal weight (cap_rel med 1.0, stroke_rel med 0.961).
